---
title: "Practical 2 Exercises"
author: "Katy Brown"
format: html
---

Using the pipe symbol - calculate the mean then absolute value of these numbers, then round it to the nearest whole number.

```{r}
input_vec <- c(5, 10, 4, 3)

result <- input_vec |>
  mean() |>
  abs() |>
  round()
```

Assign y a value of 12 and then use comparison operators to show if:
* `y` is equal to 7
* `y` is less than 15
* `y` is greater than 20
* `y` is less than or equal to 12

```{r}

y <- 12

print(y == 7)

print(y < 15)

print(y > 20)

print (y <= 12)
```
